overview: Aditya Institute of Technology and Management (AITAM), established in 2001, is a premier self-financing autonomous engineering college located in Tekkali, Srikakulam District, Andhra Pradesh. Founded by the Sri Aditya Educational Society, the campus covers 50 acres of land in the north coastal region of the state. The institution focuses on expanding career readiness, technology-led training frameworks, and research paradigms across undergraduate, postgraduate, and polytechnic diplomas.
accreditation: Autonomous status granted by the UGC. Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Gurajada, Vizianagaram (JNTUGV). The institution is accredited with an 'A+' grade by NAAC and holds NBA accreditation for several core engineering programs.

admissions.admissionProcess: Category A standard convenience seats (70%) are secured strictly via centralized state web counseling administered by APSCHE based on entrance test ranks. Remaining Category B management quota allocations are filled internally based on academic requirements.
admissions.importantDates: The admissions cycle operates between June and September following APSCHE and SBTET regulatory timelines.

facilities: Central Library with comprehensive textbook and research journal options
Departmental Engineering Workshops and Testing Labs
High-speed Campus Wi-Fi and advanced server networks
Central Fleet of College Transit Buses servicing the Srikakulam region
JNTU Recognized Ph.D. Core Research Hubs
campus.specialNote: AITAM is recognized as a Scientific and Industrial Research Organization (SIRO) by DSIR under the Ministry of Science and Technology, providing a solid workspace for student prototyping and technical research.

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: ₹42,000 – ₹55,000 per year based on room configurations and layout versions
hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Factored alongside institutional residential dining facility packages
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) structural full fee reimbursements for qualified AP native applicants
Post-Matric Student Welfare Schemes from the Government of AP
AITAM Institutional Merit Scholarships providing up to ₹50,000 for top-tier entrance qualifiers
